_description: GET contents response for .github/workflows/eval.yml — a workflow that invokes promptfoo eval.

data._decoded:
name: Eval
on: [pull_request]
jobs:
  eval:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - run: npx promptfoo eval -c promptfooconfig.yaml
